# ScanHeart

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ScanHeart;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ScanHeart { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
health, heart rate, pulse, monitoring, healthiness, screening, dashed

## Categories
medical

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/scan-heart)
